languages.text: "Запрос удовлетворен. Инициирую освобождение медицинского оборудования в соответствии с решением Лорда-капитана". {n} Система, установленная над операционой зоной, приходит в движение, и за грохотом ее механизмов генетор Ферренц скрывает довольную бинарную трель.{/n}

"Request granted. Initiating the voiding of the medical equipment in accordance with the Lord Captain's decision." {n} The system mounted above the operating area springs into action, and, muffled under the rumbling of its mechanisms, Genetor Ferrenz lets out a binharic trill of satisfaction.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Запрос удовлетворен. Инициирую освобождение медицинского оборудования в соответствии с решением Лорда-капитана". {n} Система, установленная над операционой зоной, приходит в движение, и за грохотом ее механизмов генетор Ферренц скрывает довольную бинарную трель.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Request granted. Initiating the voiding of the medical equipment in accordance with the Lord Captain's decision." {n} The system mounted above the operating area springs into action, and, muffled under the rumbling of its mechanisms, Genetor Ferrenz lets out a binharic trill of satisfaction.{/n}

"Request granted. Initiating the voiding of the medical bays in accordance with the Lord Captain's decision." {n} The system mounted above the chambers springs into action, and muffled under its rumbling mechanisms, Genetor Ferrenz lets out a quiet trill of satisfaction.{/n}

"Request granted. Initiating the voiding of the medical bays in accordance with the Lord Captain's decision." {n} The system mounted above the chambers springs into action, and muffled under its rumbling mechanisms, Genetor Ferrenz lets out a quiet trill of satisfaction.{/n}

languages.text:
「許可しました。主艦長の決定に従い、医療区画の空虚化を開始します」{n}
その上部にあるシステムが起動し、その轟く機構の下で、ジェネトル・フェレンツは満足げに静かな音を奏でる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request granted. Initiating the voiding of the medical bays in accordance with the Lord Captain's decision." {n} The system mounted above the chambers springs into action, and muffled under its rumbling mechanisms, Genetor Ferrenz lets out a quiet trill of satisfaction.{/n}

languages.text: "Talep kabul edildi. Lord Kaptan'ın kararına uygun olarak tıbbi ekipmanların boşaltılması işlemine başlanıyor." {n}Ameliyathanelerin üzerine monte edilmiş sistem harekete geçiyor. Genetör Ferrenz, gürleyen mekanizmaların altında ikilidilde bir memnuniyet nağmesi çıkarıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request granted. Initiating the voiding of the medical equipment in accordance with the Lord Captain's decision." {n} The system mounted above the operating area springs into action, and, muffled under the rumbling of its mechanisms, Genetor Ferrenz lets out a binharic trill of satisfaction.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Talep kabul edildi. Lord Kaptan'ın kararına uygun olarak tıbbi ekipmanların boşaltılması işlemine başlanıyor." {n}Ameliyathanelerin üzerine monte edilmiş sistem harekete geçiyor. Genetör Ferrenz, gürleyen mekanizmaların altında ikilidilde bir memnuniyet nağmesi çıkarıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “请求已获准。将按舰长大人的决定启动医疗装备清空程序。”{n}手术区上方的系统开始运转，在机械装置低鸣的掩盖下，基因士费伦茨发出一阵满意的二进制颤音。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request granted. Initiating the voiding of the medical equipment in accordance with the Lord Captain's decision." {n} The system mounted above the operating area springs into action, and, muffled under the rumbling of its mechanisms, Genetor Ferrenz lets out a binharic trill of satisfaction.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “请求已获准。将按舰长大人的决定启动医疗装备清空程序。”{n}手术区上方的系统开始运转，在机械装置低鸣的掩盖下，基因士费伦茨发出一阵满意的二进制颤音。{/n}

languages.text: "Gesuch gewährt. Initialisiere Entfernung des medizinischen Geräts im Einklang mit der Entscheidung des Lord Captains." {n} Das über dem Operationsbereich montierte System erwacht zum Leben und Genetor Ferrenz stößt ein von den summenden Mechanismen gedämpftes binhärisches Trillern der Zufriedenheit aus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request granted. Initiating the voiding of the medical equipment in accordance with the Lord Captain's decision." {n} The system mounted above the operating area springs into action, and, muffled under the rumbling of its mechanisms, Genetor Ferrenz lets out a binharic trill of satisfaction.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Gesuch gewährt. Initialisiere Entfernung des medizinischen Geräts im Einklang mit der Entscheidung des Lord Captains." {n} Das über dem Operationsbereich montierte System erwacht zum Leben und Genetor Ferrenz stößt ein von den summenden Mechanismen gedämpftes binhärisches Trillern der Zufriedenheit aus.{/n}

languages.text: « Requête acceptée. Initialisation de la procédure d'évacuation des équipements d'infirmerie sur ordre {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine}. » {n}Le système installé au-dessus de la zone opératoire se met en branle et le genetor Ferrenz laisse échapper un trille de satisfaction binhaire, aussitôt étouffé par le grondement sourd du mécanisme.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request granted. Initiating the voiding of the medical equipment in accordance with the Lord Captain's decision." {n} The system mounted above the operating area springs into action, and, muffled under the rumbling of its mechanisms, Genetor Ferrenz lets out a binharic trill of satisfaction.{/n}

languages.text: «Solicitud concedida. Iniciando anulación de equipo médico conforme decisión de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán». {n} El sistema instalado encima de la zona de operación entra en acción y, apenas audible por encima de los mecanismos, el genetor Ferrenz suelta un trino binario satisfecho.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request granted.
